details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. about_item: IDEAL FOR SMALL MEDIUM SIZED PETS: Measures approximately 17 x 8 x 11 Inches (L x W X H), WEIGHT LIMIT up to 18 lbs. Fits most small/medium sized dog, cat, puppy, kitten, rabbit and pet. Before purchasing please measure your pet - LENGTH: neck to base of tail; HEIGHT: floor to top of shoulder.

COMFORTABLE AND BREATHABLE: Well ventilated design for optimal airflow; entire top opens for convenient entry and zipped cover flap for privacy; also comes with thick cozy sherpa lined bedding so your pet can rest and relax. This handbag carrier is firmly structured, providing ample room for your pet to move around.

SAFE AND SECURED DESIGN: Made with durable 6000D high grade polyester for a long-lasting experience. Equipped with a firmly reinforced structure to prevent itself from collapsing on your pet while traveling. Also comes with a safety strap and buckle inside to secure your pet and prevent escape.

FUNCTIONAL AND CONVENIENT: Comes with poop bag dispenser feature, a front pocket, several mesh pockets on the side to store essential pet supplies. The handle strap is sturdy and durable, allowing you to carry this pet tote bag by hand or on your shoulder.

STYLISH PET PURSE CARRIER BAG: This airline approved pet tote bag is perfect for small or medium sized dogs and large cats. Designed for the maximum convenience and comfort for daily use, shopping, traveling and vet visit.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be a perfect travel bag that accommodates pets up to 17 lbs, with plenty of room for toys and pet care products. The bag is comfortable to carry, fits well on the shoulder, and has a cute appearance. While some customers say it's sturdy, others report it tearing at the seams, and while the zipper works well for some, others find it not great.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality, describing it as a perfect pet purse that works well for puppies.

examples.snippet: This is a great bag!
Great quality. Extra storage on sides are helpful.
I bought this so I can travel with my 5lb chihuahua and it's great. It's nice and roomy and has lots of pockets for all the necessary things that...
This is a good product and can carry lots of pet care products and snacks in addition to my fur baby. Plenty of room for my 9lb’r.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier's size positive, with plenty of room for pets up to 17 pounds, and one customer notes it complies with American Airlines dimension requirements.

examples.snippet: ...Love the design, material and structured bag, and a good size for my 8.4 lb Maltese dog to lie down comfortably in....
Although it is the perfect size, the quality is beyond bad. Not only is the inside coming apart, but the zipper broke as well....
I love the polka dot print, how roomy it is and the big pocket and bottle compartment but not enough ventilation for along trip in my opinion, too...
Too short for our little dachshunds long body.

insights.title: Storage capacity
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's storage capacity, with plenty of pockets for carrying everything and room for toys, and one customer notes the open pockets at the end and back.

examples.snippet: ...Also she has a lot of room to stretch out with her blanket. Lots of pockets so I can bring all her necessities for a trip....
...I love that this bag has multiple pockets, I even use one of them for my personal items....
I like the large pockets. I just wish it had a luggage strap to attach to handle of my suitcase....
...Large side pocket was a plus.

insights.title: Appearance
insights.summary: Customers like the appearance of the pet carrier, finding it cute, with one customer specifically mentioning its striped pattern.

examples.snippet: ...It’s cute and I have the matching training sling bag - I feel stylish using this and my dog enjoys it too (6 lb cockapoo puppy)....
...The style I got was the black with the polka dots. It's super cute as is. But with her in it it was just even more adorable....
This is a cute bag. But it is so flimsy. My puppy hated it.
Light weight, spacious and cute but my dog likes to see when he is in the bag and this doesn't have net or visibility without them putting the head...

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier comfortable, with one mentioning that their pet turns around easily in it.

examples.snippet: ...She can stand up and turn around comfortably. Also she has a lot of room to stretch out with her blanket....
It’s comfortable to carry
My dog weighs 16 pounds. Uncomfortable for him. No hard base or firm base. This bag is for tiny dogs. I have a challenge. Half chawawa half daschund.
...Room enough for me to put a cup full of hay. Very comfortable to carry and the perfect size for shopping carts, fits right into the child seat...

insights.title: Fit
insights.summary: Customers like how the pet carrier fits, noting that it comfortably sits on their shoulder.

examples.snippet: My dog fits perfectly. I love the functionality of it. It's definitely worth what was spent and I can easily carry my dog in it.
My 4 month dachshund puppy fits perfectly and she sits comfortably
It was the perfect fit. great color. Tiny. Used for my 16lb Chihuahua road trip. Lots of useful pockets. Fitted all his associates and essentials....
We have a 8.8 lbs Shitzu and she fits perfectly. Nice travel bag to take our dog places, it even has a latch for the collar so she can’t jump out....

insights.title: Sturdiness
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the carrier's sturdiness, with some finding it sturdy while others report that it is not well-made or durable, with multiple customers mentioning that it tore at the seams.

examples.snippet: ...Sturdy ,complies with the minimum American Airlines dimension’s. And has extra pockets for storage .recommend it for air travel
Good size but flimsy. I put my 5lb puppy in and he was very unbalanced
...This bag has a soft sturdy bottom, easy to zip the top and leave a little open if your dog wants to hangout....
Sturdy bag but doesn't fit in the kid part of a cart, and it is stiff in the bottom with the cushion....

insights.title: Zipper quality
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the carrier's zippers, with some reporting that they work great while others mention that they are not great and can come apart.

examples.snippet: ...it's made well, straps are a good length, color is pretty, zippers work good and my 14 lb Pom fits perfect.
...This past weekend(9/6/25), I was using it, and the zipper broke. It broke apart on one of the ends and is not usable....
The storage is nice. Locking zippers are nice but can be a little difficult to use sometimes....
Poor quality straps are short , zipper gets stuck

authors_reviews.title: Comfy carrier for your pup
authors_reviews.text: Very nice travel carrier. The perfect combination between soft sided and sturdy. Very easy to carry around and convenient. The zippers and pockets work great and there’s enough ventilation for your pup.
authors_reviews.author: Aura R.

authors_reviews.title: Great Doggy Bag- Great value
authors_reviews.text: My 5lb toy poodle loves this bag. It's comfortable for him and easy for me to carry. I was surprised at how well designed it us and a great bag to travel with.
authors_reviews.author: Jen Jen

authors_reviews.title: YES !! AMAZING BAG!!
authors_reviews.text: I got this bag for my dachsund puppy. I love everything about it. Even the attention to detail where they put the poop bag pocket with the dispenser on the outside to the little clips to keep the top pinned back or the zipper from opening. The pockets are great for putting wallet, toys, leash. The bag is everything!!!
authors_reviews.author: Bonnie

authors_reviews.title: Good not Great
authors_reviews.text: Light weight, spacious and cute but my dog likes to see when he is in the bag and this doesn't have net or visibility without them putting the head out and this is part of how my dog fell out while I was walking. I have to choose to let him see where we are going which is less safe or to fully close him inside.
authors_reviews.author: Designer S.

authors_reviews.title: Very roomy
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this for my puppy who is 5lbs. and she fits comfortably with plenty of room to grow. I love that this bag has multiple pockets, I even use one of them for my personal items. I read other reviews about zippers breaking; I feel that as long as you are gentle (use two hands) when zipping and unzipping you should have no problems. The bag is sturdy, I covered the hard bottom liner with a pee pad just in case. I throw a favorite blanket inside with her and away we go, easy peasy!
authors_reviews.author: Jamie RodriguezHudson

authors_reviews.title: Useful and good quality
authors_reviews.text: Love been a great addition for my small senior pup
authors_reviews.author: Naomi Dunagan

authors_reviews.title: Had to Frankenstein but now I like it
authors_reviews.text: Honestly I like this bag! It’s cute and I have the matching training sling bag - I feel stylish using this and my dog enjoys it too (6 lb cockapoo puppy). I enjoy the poop bag placement and all the pockets to put my personal belongings in. My cons are that I had to Frankenstein this bag with an old one to make it perfect.1. The bottom insert is not washable and is a Sherpa material that’s hard to clean - I cut it off and put on a removable cover from another bag I had. See in photo - much more comfy now.2. The neck harness inside is not adjustable and nearly choked my dog while he was trying to lie down - will not be using that feature anymore.3. It doesn’t have a crossbody strap - but I rigged on my own from another bag.4. Doesn’t necessarily keep its shape, but the small frame piece at the top helps me not squish the pup in my armpit.
authors_reviews.author: Lionel Christian

authors_reviews.title: Bunny Carrier Perfection
authors_reviews.text: Perfect for a small bunny. I put in a small baker cooling rack to attach a water bottle. Room enough for me to put a cup full of hay.Very comfortable to carry and the perfect size for shopping carts, fits right into the child seat area. Love the pockets for additional supplies.
authors_reviews.author: Twiddle Dee

other_countries_reviews.title: Lovely item sturdy and great value
other_countries_reviews.text: Really sturdy bag which fits my mini daschund perfectly.
other_countries_reviews.author: julie baker

other_countries_reviews.title: Buen producto
other_countries_reviews.text: Perfecto para viajar en avión, tiene las medidas correctas, tengo un schnauzer que cabe perfectamente y en aerolinea Volaris me ha permitido trasladarlo sin ningún inconveniente. La calidad y el color es buena.
other_countries_reviews.author: Susana Castro

other_countries_reviews.title: Meet High Standards
other_countries_reviews.text: I normally stop writing reviews, but this worth to write something, materials are amazing, strong quality, fits my maltese or havanese female 3 years old dog. One dog per bag - they are about 5kg per dog. They feel cozy on it and this is useful also in local or international travel. Shoulder bag with so many pockets outside..
other_countries_reviews.author: Ysabelle

other_countries_reviews.title: Excelente producto
other_countries_reviews.text: Bolsa de muy buena calidad y tamaño, la marca me gusta y ya se que que es garantía. Es la tercera bolsa que compro y todos los modelos han sido muy buenos y cómodos para mi chihuahua.
other_countries_reviews.author: Paola
